episodes.title: NXIVM Episode 8: The Oxenbergs, Failed States, Hollywood, and Human Trafficking Part 2
episodes.description:
In which we discuss the life of Catherine Oxenberg and exactly how many connections a person can have to trafficking and shady cults before it starts getting really weird


Music by Echoplanar

episodes.title: NXIVM: Episode 7: The Oxenbergs, Failed States, Holywood, and Human Trafficking
episodes.description:
In which we discuss a little about Yugoslavia, a little about South Africa, The life of Princess Elizabeth of Yugoslavia, and Human Trafficking at Yuugoslavian refugee camps

episodes.title: NXIVM: Episode 6: Mark Vicente, Intelligence, and the Controlled Burn
episodes.description:
In which we discuss Mark Vicente's family with multi-generational ties to intelligence, how he ended up in NXIVM, his strange behavior during his time there, and his "documentary" series The Vow for HBO
Music by DiffuseTensor

episodes.title: NXIVM: Episode 5: The Bronfmans, Frank Parlato, and Money Laundering Part 2
episodes.description: In which we discuss the Bronfman relationship with the Salinas family that goes back a lot longer than either would care to admit, the Bronfman relationship with Frank Parlato which goes back longer than either would care to admit, and the Bronfman relationship with Keith Raniere's legal team which *checks notes* goes back further than either of them would care to admit Music by DiffuseTensor

episodes.title: NXIVM: Episode 4: The Bronfmans, Frank Parlato, and Money Laundering Part 1
episodes.description: In which we discuss the history of the Bronfman family, the mysterious background of Sara and Clare's mother, and exactly how they were laundering money through NXIVM

episodes.title: NXIVM: Episode 3: The Cafritz Family, DC Real Estate, And Charles Manson
episodes.description: In which we begin our look at the first of several powerful and strange families in the NXIVM cult, as well as a direct connection to Charles Manson

episodes.title: NXIVM: Episode 2: Nancy Salzman, Lauren Salzman, and NeuroLinguistic Programming
episodes.description: In which we familiarize ourselves with the history of NLP before jumping in to the exceedingly odd relationship of Nancy and Lauren Salzman

episodes.title: NXIVM: Prologue: Mexico, The Salinas Family, and NAFTA
episodes.description: In which we tell some stories of stolen elections, gangsterism, child murders, and political assassinations from recent Mexican history in order to have proper context for the rest of the series
